emotional_read.text: Safe and welcoming at first glance, with older infrastructure creating quiet mystery.

memorable_identity.text: A working farm village gathered around a roofed stone well and reused remnants of an older facility.

geography.text: A shallow valley remains open at every required route.

first_view.text: The arrival view reads the road, well, inn silhouette, and northern tree line in that order.

landmarks.description: Roofed stone well at the civic road junction.

building_silhouettes.height_profile: Low two-storey-read silhouette; roof does not dominate the camera view.
building_silhouettes.shape_language: Compact timber cottage with a shallow irregular footprint.
variation_rules: Vary width, roof offset, and attached utility volume without changing the material family.

materials.text: Timber, local stone, restrained plaster, dark slate, and visibly reused metal.

color_language.text: Warm earth and timber against green vegetation; cool old metal is a subordinate accent.

roads_and_circulation.text: A curved civic spine joins every canonical exit and visibly reaches every public door.

density.negative_space: Keep the well square legible and use looser cultivated edges as breathing room.

environmental_storytelling.story_signal: Residents live alongside misunderstood old infrastructure.
environmental_storytelling.visual_expression: Patched metal fencing and a warm vent are integrated into ordinary village use.

canon_anchors.requirement: Preserve every route and transfer named by the canonical screen.

exclusions.description: Do not invent a blacksmith, guild, or other settlement service.
exclusions.reason: A visual brief cannot silently add story canon.
